task.inventory_reason: This is a source-family/corpus candidate rather than an isolated paper. The eLife article is part of the Reproducibility Project: Cancer Biology collection, reports 50 completed experiments from 23 papers and 158 effects, and points to project-level underlying data, code, digital materials, and the OSF replication-data object.
task.next_action: Keep as the RPCB source-family candidate; inventory the OSF RPCB collection and Replication Data from the Reproducibility Project: Cancer Biology; route paper/experiment/effect-level data tables to result-table extraction.
